content:
Anthropic, on 4/16: We're increasing limits for all subscribers because Opus 4.7 uses more tokens. Enjoy!

Anthropic, on 4/21: No more Claude Code for some Pro subscribers.

Our subscription plans weren't built for this.

content:
Claude Code's /ultrareview feature is in research preview.

You get 3 free reviews before 5/5.

Free as in: here, try this thing we're definitely charging you for later.
